prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: Her Silent Christmas Alibi
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Court-Ordered Lifetime
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Silence is just fear wearing cashmere.
Omen: phone static saying her name
Relationship dynamic: overbearing mother tension
Props: unopened letter, blood-adjacent tea towel, boat key

Cast:
- Elias Hawthorne | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=regional marketing executive | threat_aura=0.35 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; has an unsent email that would destroy a family
- Gavin Vale | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=family practice physician | threat_aura=0.29 | space=unused portable classroom holding archived disciplinary files | secrets=still has access to a property he does not own; ignored a warning text on the worst possible night
- Wyatt Vale | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=nurse with local intel | threat_aura=0.48 | space=annex room described as retreat supplies | secrets=once hid a casserole dish containing evidence; knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Claire Pruitt | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=gallery owner | threat_aura=0.63 | space=storage unit described as retreat supplies | secrets=had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Derek Bennett | archetype=soft_spoken_menace | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=artisan developer | threat_aura=0.71 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=keeps duplicate keys for reasons framed as kindness
- Daniel Hale | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=substitute teacher | threat_aura=0.45 | space=old storm shelter from before the divorce | secrets=saw the wrong person near the lake once and never shut up about it; accused an innocent scamp and feels sick about it
- Luke Cross | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Rachel Marlowe | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Gavin Vale is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Elias Hawthorne says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Marigold Falls.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Gavin?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Luke. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Elias. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The unopened letter is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Claire."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."
